description: Versioned seed manifest for calibrating Trustcheck malicious-package heuristic scoring. This file defines the required strata and metric contract; it does not yet publish empirical precision, recall, or false-positive measurements.

case_sets.label: Known malicious PyPI releases
case_sets.selection_notes: Include package-version-artifact tuples only after independent review records the source advisory, removal/yank evidence, artifact digest, behavior class, and whether redistributing the artifact is legally and operationally acceptable.

case_sets.label: Typosquats and dependency-confusion names
case_sets.selection_notes: Cover near-neighbor names, separator substitutions, transpositions, dependency-confusion collisions, and benign internal-name controls.

case_sets.label: Benign packages with native extensions
case_sets.selection_notes: Include signed and unsigned wheels across PE, ELF, and Mach-O, plus high-entropy but legitimate compression or generated code.

case_sets.label: Benign packages with powerful capabilities
case_sets.selection_notes: Include legitimate use of subprocesses, networking, obfuscation or generated code, plugin discovery, keyrings, custom installers, and build hooks.

case_sets.label: Deliberately weird but harmless academic and development packages
case_sets.selection_notes: Include toy packages, teaching examples, intentionally unusual layouts, dynamic import experiments, encoded fixtures, and research prototypes that should not be treated as malware.
